message:
fix(algorithms): directed minimum_node_cut tie-break parity (br-b51)

GrayReef: fix directed global minimum-node-cut to break equal-cardinality
ties deterministically by preferring lexicographically smaller cut set.
Fixes parity with NetworkX on 2-node directed cycle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
